description: Assign gridpoint variables initial values. All gridpoints are affected if no range is given.

keywords.name: ratio-target
keywords.description: Specifies the target local force ratio that is considered to be converged for mechanical calculations. The default value is 1e-4. A local force ratio of this value will result in a convergence value of 1.0 for the gridpoint. See the convergence keyword in the model solve command.

keywords.name: temperature
keywords.description: Initialize gridpoint temperatures (must be configured for thermal calculations – CONFIG thermal).

keywords.name: temperature-analytical
keywords.description: Initialize temperature for analytical thermal solution.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Initialize gridpoint velocity in the \(x\) -, \(y\) -, and \(z\) -directions.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Initialize the value of the extra variable i .

keywords.name: kwd:add
keywords.description: Add the specified value to the existing value.

keywords.name: kwd:gradient
keywords.description: Apply a gradient to the scalar-value provided.

keywords.name: kwd:local
keywords.description: Specify that the value supplied for the keyword is in the local coordinate system of the gridpoint (if any). By default values are initialize in the global system. This keyword cannot be used with the following keywords of the block gridpoint initialize command: extra .

keywords.name: kwd:multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the existing value by the specified value.

keywords.name: kwd:vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation to the scalar-value provided.
